rationale: Both reviews surface the identical real api-design defects (tautological curvature theorem with unused hyp; IsCompactOrientedManifold exposing public 'oriented : True'; uniform_boundedness_principle as direct banach_steinhaus alias), all confirmed in the diff and material; acting on either removes/fixes the same public declarations. Review 1's extra out-of-scope claim is not grounded in the diff and does not change the resulting API.
